gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 found missing direct-constructor type validation and non-object record handling; both were patched, covered by tests, and the re-review reported no findings.
verification: poetry run pytest -q tests/test_model_profiles.py tests/test_public_package.py tests/test_project_governance.py
GPT-5.5 review completed; initial findings resolved and re-review clean
what_changed: Added portable ModelProfileDefinition JSON artifacts for future model profiles
Exposed model profile artifact helpers through document_kv_cache and legacy root exports
Tightened KVModelProfile and model profile record validation
why: Future Qwen3.5, MiniMax, and adapter-trained KV Packet integrations need model attention geometry to travel with external model bundles without hardcoding every profile in the package.
